resources.string: XDA project for news and feedback
Something went wrong, the service is still not enabled. Please redo the tutorial and try again.

Quick Cursor is an accessibility tool that helps users with motor impairments, limb differences, hand tremors, or limited hand mobility operate their phones with one hand.

The accessibility service is required to provide this assistive functionality:

○ View and control screen
 - is needed to draw the assistive cursor over other apps and define the trigger zones

○ View and perform actions
 - is needed to perform touch actions on the user's behalf at the cursor position (the core assistive function)

○ Observe your actions
 - is needed for temporarily disable feature which pauses Quick Cursor until you change your running app to another one

These accessibility capabilities will NEVER be used for anything else. No data will be collected or sent across network.
Quick Cursor accessibility service destroyed by Android.
Quick Cursor accessibility service interrupted by Android.
Quick Cursor accessibility service rebinded by Android.
Quick Cursor accessibility service unbinded by Android.
Hide the cursor while using this action
Gradually update in the first milliseconds in order to prevent min/max instant jumps (volume, brightness, etc)
The position of the cursor directly correlates to the setting level. Moving the cursor from left to right adjusts the setting linearly from minimum to maximum.

Adjusts the setting based on its current level and the direction in which the cursor is moved. Moving the cursor left decreases the setting relative to its current level, while moving it right increases the setting relative to its current level.
How much to swipe proportional to the screen size
How fast the setting should update on cursor movement
If the brightness slider minimum and maximum values are not enough
Will choose between normal and interpolator based on your Android version
Recommended for newer Android versions (after Android P)
Recommended for older Android versions (before Android P)
Couldn\'t copy text from cursor position.
Couldn\'t place the text in clipboard.
Copy the text directly to clipboard
Open the Android share popup with the copied text
Simulate an Android back button press
Change brightness swiping on the trigger
Cancel the next tap on release (if auto tap is enabled).
Double tap at cursor position on tracker release
Pull down the quick settings. If this doesn\'t work on MIUI, please use the gesture swipe down.
Simulate a two finger swipe up from the bottom to start Samsung multi-window shortcut
Simulate a swipe down on the top left part of the screen to open the notification bar
Simulate a swipe right, at cursor position, from the left part of the screen to open the app menu
Simulate a pinch in at cursor position
Simulate a pinch out at cursor position
Simulate a swipe down on the top right part of the screen to open the quick settings for MIUI
Simulate a swipe at cursor position
Simulate an Android home button press
Simulate a multitap on the screen to temporary fix the Android 15 click bug
Pick an app from your device and launch it
Pick an app shortcut from your device and launch it
Long tap at cursor position on tracker release
Decrease media volume step by step
Increase media volume step by step
Multi tap at cursor position on tracker release
Open the app drawer on some launchers (not all launchers support this action)
Open tracker actions until tracker disappears
Open tracker actions while still holding the tracker until one action was executed
Paste clipboard data to focused input
Simulate real-time gestures like: drag & drop, swipe, long tap, etc
Simulate an Android recents button press
Rotate screen to portrait/landscape (and disable auto rotate)
Take a screenshot and copy it to clipboard
Select all text from focused input
Records a gesture (swipe, long tap, drag & drop, etc) and simulate it after
Stop the gesture recording that it is in progress
Switch to the previous used app
Disable QC temporarily until you switch to another app
Disable QC temporarily until the timer expires
Toggle between brightness mode auto or manual
Pass the long tap through trigger, long tapping what\'s behind the trigger
Pass the tap through trigger, clicking what\'s behind the trigger
Change volume swiping on the trigger
Hide the cursor before launching assistant
Set 0 for default Android long tap duration
Works only with auto tap mode enabled
Maximum Android version required is Android Pie (SDK 28)
Minimum Android version required is Android Pie (SDK 28)
Minimum Android version required is Android Q (SDK 29)
Minimum Android version required is Android R (SDK 30)
Minimum Android version required is Android S (SDK 31)
Minimum Android version required is Android 16 (SDK 36)
Action may not be supported by your system
To be added in next updates
This actions works only with Instant or Delayed trigger mode. If not, it will automatically fallback to Instant mode.
Show extra options buttons in the bottom right corner
Not all apps support image paste from clipboard. It works best with keyboards that support image in clipboard (like Gboard)
Do you want the inactivity timeout to be enabled before first tracker touch?
Choose the disable duration from a popup
EXPERIMENTAL. Works only on Android 12 or newer (API level 31+).
Flashlight can\'t be controlled by Quick Cursor. It is used by another app.
Use Accessibility stream instead of Media stream to fix the volume change issue while the app is on background on OnePlus/Oppo/Realme devices.
Do you want to also display the Android volume panel when you change the volume?
How granular should the volume change be? This is experimental. If it doesn\'t work as expected, please set it to 10.
Tries to detect the most relevant stream between ring, media and in-call
Show the system volume panel when volume changes
Edge action vibrations and visual feedback
Reset all vibrations and visual feedback settings to default
Enable vibration on tracker actions menu
Enable vibration on cursor action (long tap, copy text, etc)
Duration of the vibration in milliseconds
Enable vibration when tracker and cursor appear on screen
Enable visual feedback on click action
The color of the click visual feedback
The color of the cursor visual feedback
Enable visual feedback on cursor action
Visual feedback animation duration in milliseconds
Quick Cursor will be turned off every time an app from the list it is opened
Quick Cursor will not react to application opening or closing
Quick Cursor will be turned on only when an app from the list it is opened
Couldn\'t trigger the {[app]} shortcut. The app is not installed or other error.
After how many milliseconds to auto tap after tracker release
No auto tapping. Tap the tracker manually to click at cursor position.
Auto tap at cursor position on every tracker release, after grabbing a new cursor or move an existing one.
Auto tap at cursor position on first tracker release after grabbing a cursor.
Save all your current settings to an external file
Backup file is invalid or unreadable
Success! All your settings were reset to default values.
Reset all settings to default values
All your current settings will be replaced. Are you sure?
Restore your old settings from an external file
The backup file was saved successfully
Something went wrong on update, some size preferences were lost :(
Find Quick Cursor app in the battery optimization app list and choose \"Don\'t optimize\" to prevent Android stopping the app in the background.

Quick Cursor uses a background accessibility service to provide the assistive cursor whenever you need it.

Some Android versions, such as MIUI (Xiaomi) or OneUI (Samsung), are more aggressive at killing background services, including accessibility services.

If Quick Cursor stops working on your device after some time, please try the following possible solutions:

Each manufacturer implements its own method to lock the apps in memory, but the most used method is from the recents menu.

Bring the Android recents menu and hold the Quick Cursor app for a few seconds. Press the lock button to prevent Android killing it.

If the lock option is not present in the recents menu, search on Google on how to lock an app in memory for your specific device.
Note: The OEM battery button cannot detect if you already disabled any optimizations.
Disable any OEM battery optimization for Quick Cursor. It may be already disabled by the \"battery optimization\" button above.
Error opening battery settings. Please manually disable all optimizations from device settings. For more details check dontkillmyapp.com
Reset all blacklist/whitelist settings to default

1. Drag the notification bar without leaving the app

2. Turn off auto brightness or adaptive brightness

3. Manually drag the brightness slider to minimum value

4. Manually drag the brightness slider to maximum value

5. The below fields should automatically change to the detected min and max device brightness values

● **Support the developer** of this **free and without ads** accessibility tool

● **Trigger actions** - perform shortcuts directly from the edge of the screen, reducing the need for hard-to-perform gestures

● **Tracker actions** - a quick action menu accessible from the tracker, useful for users with limited finger dexterity

● **Edge actions** - trigger actions from the edge of the screen with the cursor, replacing system gestures that are difficult to perform with limited mobility

● **Floating tracker** mode (the tracker stays on the screen like a floating bubble for users who need constant access)

● Customize the **triggers, tracker and cursor** visuals and sizes for users with low vision or specific motor preferences

● Customize the tracker behaviour (inactivity hide timer, hide on outside action) to match each user's needs

● Unlock all assistive actions for trigger/tracker/edge actions:

 - expand notifications or quick settings without reaching the top of the screen

 - simulate home, back or recents button presses

 - screenshot, flashlight, lock screen, switch to previous app, copy, cut, paste, split screen, open app drawer

 - launch apps or app shortcuts

 - media shortcuts: play, pause, next, previous

 - change brightness, volume, auto rotate and others

 - simulate complex gestures (swipes, pinches, drag-and-drop)

● Customize vibrations and visual feedback

● **Backup and restore** all settings
%1$s won\'t work unless you enable Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device.
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device.
%1$s won\'t run unless you update Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are currently updating.
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Do you really want to override the advanced triggers settings with the current Triggers settings?
Do you really want to delete the action?
You will need to enable the accessibility service again from the device settings.
Do you really want to reset all edge actions settings?
\"How to use\" works only with default triggers. Your trigger settings will reset to default if you continue.
Do you really want to reset all advanced triggers settings?
Do you really want to reset all settings to default values?
Do you really want to reset all blacklist/whitelist settings?
Do you really want to reset all cursor settings?
Do you really want to reset all floating mode settings?
Do you really want to reset all simple triggers settings?
Do you really want to reset all tracker actions design settings?
Do you really want to reset all behaviour settings?
Do you really want to reset all visual settings?
Do you really want to reset all trigger actions pie design settings?
Do you really want to reset all vibrations and visuals settings?
Use one of your own PNG image as cursor. You can check icons8.com, flaticon.com or custom-cursor.com for ideas
The color of the inside small dot
The color of transparent fill inside the outer circle
The color of inner and outer circle
Cursor is visible only while touching the tracker
Reset all cursor settings to default
PRO version activation failed, reverting back to free
Do you really want to clear all logs?
Keep it enabled only when you are looking for more info on a bug
Quick Cursor: Error, can\'t add the Quick Settings tile. Contact developer.
Add some extra visuals for more info in screenshots/screen records
Shortcut not supported. Unfortunately, the created shortcut can be launched only by launcher apps.
Use the global edge action trigger mode setting
Edge action is triggered after a time delay if the cursor is kept over the edge threshold
Edge action is triggered instantly when the cursor goes over the edge threshold
Edge action is triggered when you release the tracker and the cursor it\'s still over the threshold
The distance traveled by the cursor over the screen edge to trigger the action
How many milliseconds delay until the edge action is triggered
Show the action icon in the preview
Vibration feedback on edge action trigger
Show a visual feedback on edge action trigger
Reset all edge actions settings to default
Failed to create Camera image file
The permission was not granted. Please give this permission from settings.
Reset all floating mode settings to default
Warning!\n\nUsing a custom tap or long tap action will add a small delay when grabbing the tracker from the edge
The size of the tracker when it is in resting position on the edge of the screen
Something went wrong, please email support@quickcursor.app
Quick Cursor: something went wrong, please restart the app if it is not working.
On some devices, the installed services are hidden in a submenu, search for Quick Cursor in anything related to \'services\'.
Tap the service toggle to enable it.
After the device settings opens, tap the Quick Cursor app in the downloaded services section.
On some devices, the installed services are hidden in a submenu, search for Quick Cursor in anything related to \'services\'.\n\nTap the service toggle to enable it.
Tap allow and that\'s it! Quick Cursor will never do any network request, all your data stays on your device!

Quick Cursor couldn\'t send the gesture because the Android Accessibility Service stopped to dispatch gestures. This is a known bug in some devices and can be triggered by other apps that use accessibility services or by some integrated ones, like the One-Handed mode on Samsung devices. To resolve this issue, disable and enable the Quick Cursor accessibility service or restart your device. If you keep having this problem for unknown reasons, please contact me on support@quickcursor.app.
Open the Accessibility Android menu to manually restart the service
Send an email with your device name and software version
The cursor and trail color when in gesture recorder mode
Swipe from the left or the right trigger zone from the bottom half of the screen to grab a cursor
Now you can reach the upper half of the screen with the cursor
Tap the tracker to click with the cursor

The tracker will disappear after a few seconds of inactivity or on outside tap

Triggers will be automatically disabled while the keyboard is open

While using the Quick Cursor, touch with another finger to open the quick actions menu
Google introduced a bug in Android 15 that breaks the click simulation in some situations. When this happens, no app can simulate a tap on the screen anymore.
I\'ve reported the bug to Google and they confirmed and fixed the bug in Android 16, but the bug still exists in some devices with Android 15 (Pixel, Xiaomi and others).
This can\'t be fixed by app developers but there are a few workarounds by simulating multi taps on the screen. More details: https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/384188031
The workaround is also available as an action called \'Android 15 click bug workaround\' that you can set anywhere you want (Edge actions, Tracker actions, etc)
Tries to detect when the click stops working and tries to simulate multi taps until it works again.
Simulates a multi tap on the screen when you long tap the tracker. If your click doesn\'t work, you have to long tap the tracker.
Simulates a multi tap on the screen every time the tracker is moved. This is more intrusive and might interfere with other apps (or notification bar).
Workarounds for clicks not working after some time
Nothing changes, the tracker stays in its current position.
The tracker will be moved above the keyboard.
Triggers are disabled completely when the keyboard is open to prevent unwanted triggers
Nothing changes when the keyboard is open, the triggers will remain over the keyboard
The triggers will move above the keyboard
This mode does not work in some apps or some situations, it is an experimental mode to see if it is better than nothing.

Limited mode tries to simulate a tap in a different way, because the normal way doesn\'t work on your device because of bad Android Accessibility Service implementation by your device manufacturer or because of other accessibility services enabled.
Use Limited mode only if Simple mode doesn\'t work on your device. Please do not report bugs that Limited mode does not work in application X or Y, I can\'t do anything about that.
Contact your manufacturer to fix your device Accessibility Service implementation so you can use the normal mode which works on almost all devices.
Disable the accessibility service and stop the app completely
Frequently asked questions, known problems and possible solutions
Annual subscription canceled. Thanks for support
Annual subscription active. Thanks for support

- [**Alân Yalçın**](mailto:muassa05@gmail.com) - Turkish and Kurdish translation and testing 

- **Alex Procopovich** - Russian translation and testing 

- [**@alberstelar**](https://www.instagram.com/alberstelar/) - Spanish translation and testing 

- **damelo850** - Polish translation and testing 

- [**Daan Oosterbaan**](mailto:d.oosterbaan.92@gmail.com) - Dutch translation and testing 

- **Holger Hartwig** - German translation and testing 

- **D4.gma** - Italian translation and testing 

- **中国人民** - Chinese simplified translation 

- [**Amaljith**](https://www.amaljith.me) - Malayalam translation 

- [**Vijaykumar Babariya**](https://www.fiverr.com/vijaybabariya) - Hindi translation 

- **Lennon Roberto** - Brazilian Portuguese translation and testing
Thanks to everyone that sent me feedback, bugs and ideas!\n\nMany thanks to everyone involved in translating and testing:

## Open source libraries 
 
 [Android Open Source Project](https://source.android.com) - Apache License, Version 2.0 
 
 [Markwon]([https://github.com/noties/Markwon](https://github.com/noties/Markwon)) - Apache License, Version 2.0 
 
 [Google GSON]([https://github.com/google/gson](https://github.com/google/gson)) - Apache License, Version 2.0 
 
 [HSV-Alpha Color Picker for Android]([https://github.com/martin-stone/hsv-alpha-color-picker-android](https://github.com/martin-stone/hsv-alpha-color-picker-android)) - Apache License, Version 2.0 
 
 [AppIntro]([https://github.com/AppIntro/AppIntro](https://github.com/AppIntro/AppIntro)) - Apache License, Version 2.0 
 
 [Localization Library](https://github.com/akexorcist/Localization) - Apache License, Version 2.0 
 
 [HK Grotesk Font](https://hanken.co/products/hk-grotesk) - SIL OFL
 
 [Android Permissions](https://github.com/nabinbhandari/Android-Permissions) - Apache License, Version 2.0
 
 [Android Image Cropper](https://github.com/CanHub/Android-Image-Cropper) - Apache License, Version 2.0
 
 [Icons by Icons8](https://icons8.com/) - [Icons8 license](https://icons8.com/license)
 
 [flaticon.com](flaticon.com)

	License shall mean the terms and conditions for use, reproduction, and distribution as defined by Sections 1 through 9 of this document.

For the purposes of this definition, control means (i) the power, direct or indirect, to cause the direction or management of such entity, whether by contract or otherwise, or (ii) ownership of fifty percent (50%) or more of the outstanding shares, or (iii) beneficial ownership of such entity.

For the purposes of this License, Derivative Works shall not include works that remain separable from, or merely link (or bind by name) to the interfaces of, the Work and Derivative Works thereof.

For the purposes of this definition, submitted means any form of electronic, verbal, or written communication sent to the Licensor or its representatives, including but not limited to communication on electronic mailing lists, source code control systems, and issue tracking systems that are managed by, or on behalf of, the Licensor for the purpose of discussing and improving the Work, but excluding communication that is conspicuously marked or otherwise designated in writing by the copyright owner as Not a Contribution.

You may add Your own attribution notices within Derivative Works that You distribute, alongside or as an addendum to the NOTICE text from the Work, provided that such additional attribution notices cannot be construed as modifying the License.

	END OF TERMS AND CONDITIONS

**Thanks for supporting me** on developing and maintaining this accessibility tool!

If you find a bug, have an idea to improve the app or have a feature request please contact me on any channel below (email, telegram, XDA, Reddit).

**Rating the app on Play Store** would be another great way to support the app. It would help the app be more visible on Play Store. Please rate the app!
Missing Android permissions on some actions

This backup file it\'s from an older version which doesn\'t contain the screen resolution. You must enter the resolution of the device from which this backup was made. Leave the default values if this is the same device or have the same resolution.
Invalid resolution entered: {[resolution]}. Please try again!
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
No app found that can open the URL:
Your transaction is in pending state from Google Play. The PRO version will activate in a few moments, when the transaction is completed.
Camera permission is needed to take a picture. Please allow permission from Settings > Permissions.
The strength of the vibration. 0 for default.
A backup of the previous PRO settings before the subscription expiration was found. Do you want to restore the previous settings?
Add the current app to the blacklist
Turn off Quick Cursor until you manually start it again
Disable QC until you open another app
⚠️ Heights greater than 200dp may not work properly with system gesture navigation
Force the rotation on all apps (even if the app does not support it), until another rotation is chosen or lock the device
Set the default Android rotation setting
This setting can\'t be changed on the free version. Please buy the PRO version!
All your configured colors will be replaced with your material you theme. Are you sure?
Do you want to keep the current configured colors or reset to default Quick Cursor colors?
Automatically change the color of cursor, tracker, trail and others, based on your material you theme
Automatically turn off while S Pen is detached
Extra margin between trigger/tracker and keyboard. It may help if you want to not overlap buttons that are directly above keyboard (send message, record voice, etc).
What percentage of the initial size should the triggers be thinned to?
Restrict system gestures on the trigger and tracker position. Android limits the restriction to maximum 200dp height per side.
Choose which trigger to be triggered:
Only recommended actions are available in the free version. For more, buy PRO.
Quick Cursor service is not running.
The trigger from this shortcut doesn\'t exist anymore
Reset all trigger settings to default
Trigger area size located on the screen margins.

Quick Cursor is an accessibility tool that helps users with motor impairments and limited hand mobility operate their phones with one hand. A quick tutorial will guide you through the necessary steps to enable the required accessibility service.
Change the trigger size so you can easily grab a cursor when you need it

There is an issue. The accessibility service is enabled but the service is not running. You must force close the app from phone settings OR you have to manually disable the accessibility service from phone settings. If it doesn\'t work, a device restart is needed.
Something went wrong, the app was not force stopped. Try again!
PRO subscription expired, reverting back to free version
The maximum distance traveled by the tracker to be considered a click/long click
Detect when the app can\'t simulate taps and display a popup message.
Double tap detection will add delay to all normal taps
How many milliseconds between taps to be considered a double tap
Touching the screen edges while recording a gesture will cancel the recorder
Doesn\'t work on most situations. This \'limited\' mode is not supported anymore because it wasn\'t good enough to be used!
Long tap action is not available because Android 15 long tap workaround is enabled
How many milliseconds to long tap the tracker to be considered a long tap
Reset all tap behaviour settings to default values
Do you really want to reset tap behaviour settings to default?
Second tap might not function on Android 15 or newer.
Upgrade to lifetime license. One time payment
Open Play Store subscriptions to cancel your annual subscription payment
If you appreciate my work on this app and want to thank me again:
Leave a review on Play Store
Annual subscription canceled but it is still active until the period expires
The active subscription can\'t be cancelled automatically. You can manually cancel it manually before or after buying lifetime license.
Tutorial is available only with simple triggers mode.
Hide tracker after action has ended
Use the global tracker action trigger mode setting
Tracker action is triggered after a time delay
Tracker action is triggered instantly when it is touched
Tracker action is triggered when you release the touch
Display the icon of the center action
How many milliseconds delay until the tracker center action is triggered
Reset tracker actions inside, outside, stroke settings
Tracker actions remain visible all the time
Automatically set the offset angle to center the first action on the bottom
Your current long tap tracker action is \"{[action]}\". Do you want to replace this action and open the tracker actions instead?
Open tracker actions on tracker long tap
Set an edge action to open the tracker actions
Change long tap, double tap or second tap action
How many milliseconds delay until the tracker action is triggered
Vibration feedback on trigger actions menu
Keep tracker area proportional with cursor area. This will ensure the cursor speed is the same on both vertical and horizontal axis.
Use one of your own image as tracker
Hide the tracker on fling gesture
Hide the tracker on any outside action
Hide the tracker after some time of inactivity
After how many milliseconds after the last interaction with the tracker to hide it
The color inside the tracker gradient
The color outside the tracker gradient
Reset all behaviour settings to default values
Reset tracker size, inside and outside color to default
Tracker actions automatically opens every time
High trail quality but more resource intensive
Low trail quality but more resource efficient

swipe ↑ for RECENTS
swipe ← for BACK
swipe ↓ for HOME
long swipe ↑ for QUICK SETTINGS
long swipe ← for CURSOR
long swipe ↓ for NOTIFICATIONS

swipe ↑ for SWITCH TO PREV APP
swipe ← for BACK
swipe ↓ for HOME
long swipe ↑ for RECENTS
long swipe ← for CURSOR
long swipe ↓ for SPLIT SCREEN

swipe ↑ for QUICK SETTINGS
swipe ← for CAMERA
swipe ↓ for NOTIFICATIONS
long swipe ↑ for FLASHLIGHT
long swipe ← for CURSOR
long swipe ↓ for SCREENSHOT

swipe ↑ for QUICK SETTINGS
swipe ↖ for LAUNCH CAMERA
swipe ← for SWITCH TO PREV APP
swipe ↙ for OPEN APP DRAWER
swipe ↓ for NOTIFICATIONS
long swipe ↑ for FLASHLIGHT
long swipe ↖ for TOGGLE AUTO ROTATE
long swipe ← for CURSOR
long swipe ↙ for SCREENSHOT
long swipe ↓ for LOCK SCREEN
Swipe or long tap to grab a cursor. Tapping the trigger will tap under the trigger
An extra number of long swipe actions
Custom actions when you swipe vertically, diagonally or horizontally
swipe ↑ for BRIGHTNESS\nswipe ← for CURSOR\nswipe ↓ for VOLUME

swipe ↑ for QUICK SETTINGS
swipe ↖ for HOME
swipe ← for CURSOR
swipe ↙ for BACK
swipe ↓ for NOTIFICATIONS
long tap for recents

swipe ↑ for HOME
swipe ← for CURSOR
swipe ↓ for BACK
long tap for RECENTS
swipe ↑ for QUICK SETTINGS\nswipe ← for CURSOR\nswipe ↓ for NOTIFICATIONS

swipe ↑ for FLASHLIGHT
swipe ↖ for CAMERA
swipe ← for CURSOR
swipe ↙ for LOCK SCREEN
swipe ↓ for SCREENSHOT

swipe ↑ for OPEN APP DRAWER
swipe ↖ for VOLUME CONTROL
swipe ← for CURSOR
swipe ↙ for SCREENSHOT
swipe ↓ for SWITCH TO PREV APP
Use the global trigger action trigger mode setting
Trigger action is triggered after a time delay
Trigger action is triggered instantly when it is touched
Trigger action is triggered when you release the touch
Reset all action icon design settings to default values
Reset all pie design settings to default values
How many milliseconds delay until the trigger action is triggered
Vibration feedback on trigger actions menu
Apply to outside corners based on trigger position (if possible)
Choose your own image from your files
Advanced trigger zones with more configurations. Harder to configure but can achieve complex combinations
Trigger zones are replaced by the tracker, which is placed like a floating bubble on the edge of the screen
Trigger zones near the edge of the screen
Grab a cursor on trigger long tap
Grab a cursor on trigger swipe
Tap under the trigger on trigger tap
The current opened app it is blacklisted or not whitelisted:
Can\'t turn on because keyboard is open.
The screen is off or lockscreen is on.
Disabled while S Pen is detached. Check settings
Something looks wrong, please email me at support@quickcursor.app if the app doesn\'t work. Thanks!
Both input and output Uri must be specified
Therefore, override color resource (ucrop_color_toolbar_widget) in your app to make it work on pre-L devices
Windowed mode it is experimental and might not work on all devices. Android doesn\'t include an official way for launching apps in windowed mode.
In order for this to work, your device must support freeform windows. You can try to activate the \'Enable freeform windows\' option form developer options.
If no options work for you, I\'m sorry, but it is the best I can do as a developer of a normal app without system/root permissions.
